description: samplingRate at boundary 1.0 (default) — all events are sent, exactly 1 HTTP call made
notes: samplingRate=1.0 is the upper boundary (send all events). A random value in [0.0, 1.0) is never > 1.0, so the event MUST always be sent. This complements wire-2 which tests the samplingRate=0.0 lower boundary (drop all).

description: Non-200 HTTP response (400 Bad Request) — SDK MUST resolve, not reject
notes: Per SPEC.md Section 7.4 and the error taxonomy (Section 7.5): non-200 HTTP responses MUST resolve (not reject). The resolved value is [] — empty eventProperties yield an empty schema. SDK MUST NOT throw or reject the promise on 4xx/5xx responses.

description: Empty eventProperties — extractSchema returns [], promise resolves with []
notes: Empty eventProperties {} extracts to an empty schema []. The HTTP request is still sent with eventProperties: [] in the wire body. Promise resolves with [] (the extracted schema). Verifies that empty input does not cause an error or rejection.
